focus: Make the local Cranfield results comparable to the Cranfield BERT paper's NDCG@20 table.
reason_started: The operator pointed out that the paper reports scores above 0.4 and asked whether the local result was best or comparable to recorded evidence.
reason_ended: Binary NDCG@20 evaluation and a separate paper-style BM25 index profile were added and measured without changing the public default.

external_reference.paper: Ghasemi and Hiemstra, BERT meets Cranfield

validators_executed.name: node --test
validators_executed.evidence: Local node tests passed after relevance-mode and paper-BM25 index-profile additions.

validators_executed.name: live binary NDCG@20 evaluations
validators_executed.evidence: Default and paper-style BM25 binary NDCG@20 evaluations completed over 225 Cranfield queries.

validators_skipped.name: Cloudflare deploy verification
validators_skipped.reason: No deployment was requested; GEN-014 leaves the public default unchanged.

validators_skipped.name: Supervised BERT reranker reproduction
validators_skipped.reason: Requires additional dependencies and a separate experiment.

evidence_quality_notes: The paper-BM25 index parameter change barely moved local BM25, so the remaining gap is likely implementation, evaluation, document representation, or supervised neural ranking.
